# `generateCompletion`

Generated reference page for the `generateCompletion` function export.

- Import: `dreamcli`
- Export kind: function
- Declared in: `src/core/completion/index.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/completion/index.ts:65`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/completion/index.ts#L65)

## Signatures

```ts
function generateCompletion(
  schema: CLISchema,
  shell: Shell,
  options?: CompletionOptions,
): string;
```

| Parameter                                     | Type                          | Description                                              |
| --------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| `schema`                                      | `schema: CLISchema`           | The CLI schema describing commands, flags, and args.     |
| `shell`                                       | `shell: Shell`                | Target shell.                                            |
| `options`                                     | `options?: CompletionOptions` | Optional generator configuration such as function naming |
| and root default-command completion behavior. |                               |                                                          |

## Examples

```ts

// e.g. source <(mycli completions bash)
```
